mission.title: signoz: [Dashboard Request] ASP .NET Metrics Dashboard
mission.description: [Dashboard Request] ASP .NET Metrics Dashboard. Community-requested feature.

steps.title: Check current signoz deployment
steps.description:
Verify your signoz version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n signoz -l app.kubernetes.io/name=signoz
helm list -n signoz 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working signoz installation.

steps.title: Review signoz configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant signoz configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n signoz -l app.kubernetes.io/name=signoz
kubectl get configmap -n signoz -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=signoz
```
### 1. Dashboard Name

**ASP .NET Metrics Dashboard**

---

### 2.

steps.title: Apply the fix for [Dashboard Request] ASP .NET Metrics Dashboard
steps.description:
Hey community,
Thank you for your contributions to the dashboard bug bounty programme and for being part of the SigNoz community.

Sadly, we're winding down the bug bounty programme and closing all issues raised under it, including this one. The programme has been a wonderful way to collaborate with the community, and the dashboards that have come through it have made SigNoz materially better for everyone who uses it.

We thank you for the time and care that went into every contribution.

See the source issue for community-verified solutions.

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n signoz -l app.kubernetes.io/name=signoz
kubectl get events -n signoz --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "[Dashboard Request] ASP .NET Metrics Dashboard" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
Hey community,
Thank you for your contributions to the dashboard bug bounty programme and for being part of the SigNoz community.

Sadly, we're winding down the bug bounty programme and closing all issues raised under it, including this one.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with signoz installed or the issue environment reproducible.
